name: Prompt Armor
description: Detect prompt injection, jailbreaks, and adversarial attacks in every incoming message. 4 parallel analysis layers, 93% F1, ~19ms, runs offline.

mode.description: block=reject attacks, warn=flag but allow, log=silent logging

scanExternalOnly.description: If true, only scans messages containing URLs, file refs, or pasted content

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for prompt-armor analysis
